info.title: Noetfield Institutional API
info.description: Public and pilot governance APIs for Noetfield. Pre-execution policy evaluation only — not payments or custody.
info.x-non-psp: Noetfield does not execute payments, hold custody, or operate as a PSP/MSB.

mode.description: Bank Pilot uses shadow only — evaluate without execution side effects.

non_psp_boundary.default: Noetfield does not execute payments, hold custody, or operate as a PSP/MSB.

message.title: Message
message.default: Intake recorded. Operations notified asynchronously — follow-up via email within one business day.
